title: [Black Swan Castle, Courtyard]
description: The center of the courtyard is the sole spot where sunlight regularly manages to sneak past the guardian shadows of the towers and walls.  Weeds grow luxuriantly and tall grasses have gone to seed in what once may have been an extravagant flowerbed, nearly obscuring a spoked long-armed catapult.  Cradled in the crook of the walls, the guard tower rises up through the mists, but is overshadowed by the massive keep to the north.
paths: Obvious paths: north, northeast, east, southeast, south, southwest, west, northwest
